headline.zh: 计算机工程的思维，软件工程的手艺，一个由结构与品味共同构建的数字世界。
headline.en: Computer engineering mind. Software engineering craft. A digital world built with structure and taste.

status.zh: 正在设计更有分寸的产品体验与更高级的 Web 前端。
status.en: Designing thoughtful products and premium web experiences.

intro.zh: 我做的软件，既要在运动中显得有分寸，也要在结构上站得住，同时保留个人语气。
intro.en: I build software that feels intentional in motion, credible in structure, and personal in tone.

heroStatement.zh: Lyu World 不是一页简历，而是一个由身份、作品、记录与氛围共同构成的设计系统。
heroStatement.en: Lyu World is not a resume page. It is a designed system of identity, work, records, and atmosphere.

zh: 前端架构
设计系统
编辑感 Web 体验
产品工程
动效与交互
en: Frontend architecture
Design systems
Editorial web experiences
Product engineering
Motion and interaction

detail.zh: 跨越产品、平台与高级前端系统。
detail.en: Across products, platforms, and premium frontend systems.

detail.zh: 从平台工具到产品改版，再到 Web 叙事体验。
detail.en: From platform tooling to product redesigns and web storytelling.

detail.zh: 身份、工作、经历、记录与联系。
detail.en: Identity, work, experience, records, and contact.

zh: 软件不应该只有功能完成度，也应该带着情绪上的清晰。
层级、节奏与质地，与正确性同样重要。
最好的前端系统既能让未来更容易推进，也不会长得像模板。
en: Software should carry emotional clarity, not just functional completion.
Hierarchy, pacing, and texture matter as much as correctness.
The best frontend systems make future work easier without looking generic.

aboutPrelude.zh: 我的背景扎根于技术，但我最在意的工作，通常发生在系统与表达交界的地方。
aboutPrelude.en: I come from a technically grounded background, but the work I care about most lives at the edge between systems and expression.

zh: 这通常意味着要带着纪律去做界面：更清楚的信息架构、更干净的组件边界、更有分寸的 motion，以及真正统一的主题系统。
它也意味着在意一个网站“感觉如何”。它是否会呼吸，是否尊重注意力，是否留下一个观点，而不是只留下一套模板。
en: That usually means building interfaces with discipline: stronger information architecture, cleaner component boundaries, more thoughtful motion, and real theme coherence.
It also means caring about how a site feels. Whether it breathes correctly. Whether it respects attention. Whether it leaves behind a point of view instead of a template.

summary.zh: 一个面向基础设施团队的命令与观测工作台，在高压场景中仍然追求清晰。
summary.en: A command-and-observability workspace for infrastructure teams that needed clarity under pressure.

impact.zh: 关键流程重构后，值班交接时间减少了 34%。
impact.en: Cut operator handoff time by 34% after redesigning critical flows.

role.zh: 负责前端架构、设计语言与核心仪表板交付。
role.en: Led frontend architecture, design language, and core dashboard delivery.

challenge.zh: 原有工作台虽然功能强大，却把真正有用的信号埋在了密集的界面里。
challenge.en: The original workspace exposed a lot of power but buried the useful signal inside dense UI.

outcome.zh: 最终形成了更冷静的命令界面、更清楚的语义层级，以及可复用的数据原语。
outcome.en: Introduced a calmer command surface, stronger semantic hierarchy, and reusable data primitives.

zh: 构建了可扩展到 dashboard 级别的路由与布局模型。
通过渐进揭示与更清楚的分组降低 panel 杂乱度。
定义了可迁移到其他内部工具的表层模式。
en: Built a composable route and layout model for dashboard-scale growth.
Reduced panel clutter with progressive disclosure and clearer grouping.
Defined reusable surface patterns that informed other internal tools.

summary.zh: 一个为创意工程工作室打造的沉浸式多页网站，承载大量研究型内容。
summary.en: An immersive portfolio-style product site for a research-heavy creative engineering studio.

impact.zh: 在保持鲜明品牌气质的前提下，提高了高质量线索转化。
impact.en: Improved qualified inbound conversion while preserving a highly distinctive brand feel.

role.zh: 独立完成整体视觉方向与多页前端体验实现。
role.en: Designed and implemented the full multi-page frontend experience.

challenge.zh: 团队想要“高级且难忘”的结果，但不能滑向过度设计的噪音。
challenge.en: The team wanted something premium and memorable without slipping into over-designed noise.

outcome.zh: 最终形成了一套更有编辑感的布局语言，以及更克制却更完整的动态叙事。
outcome.en: Created an editorial layout system with restrained animation and a cleaner content narrative.

zh: 把站点组织成多页叙事，而不是一页式长页面。
在桌面与移动端之间平衡了表现力与可读性。
让 motion 服务于层级与连续性，而不是表面装饰。
en: Structured the site around multi-page storytelling instead of one long page.
Balanced expressive typography with high scanability on mobile and desktop.
Used motion to support hierarchy and continuity rather than decoration.

summary.zh: 一套面向工程管理者的内部运营工具，用来协调发布、人员与质量门槛。
summary.en: An internal operations suite for engineering managers coordinating releases, staffing, and quality gates.

impact.zh: 把零散表格替换为统一界面，并被管理层按周使用。
impact.en: Replaced fragmented spreadsheets with a shared operational surface used weekly by leadership.

role.zh: 负责前端领域模型、应用骨架与共享组件模式。
role.en: Owned the frontend domain model, app shell, and shared component patterns.

challenge.zh: 团队决策速度被分散数据和不一致工具拖慢。
challenge.en: Decision-making was slowed by scattered data and inconsistent tooling across teams.

outcome.zh: 最终把报表、任务可见性与发布准备度收束到同一个结构化界面中。
outcome.en: Unified reporting, task visibility, and release readiness into a single structured workspace.

zh: 为流程密集型输入构建了稳定的表单与校验体验。
设计了可复用的摘要卡片与时间线组件。
留下了便于后续模块继续扩展的结构基础。
en: Built reliable form and validation flows for process-heavy operational input.
Designed reusable summary cards and timelines for status-heavy interfaces.
Left behind structure that made future modules easier to add.

summary.zh: 一个个人实验环境，用来探索系统想法、渲染、性能与实现层面的实验。
summary.en: A personal environment for exploring systems ideas, rendering, performance, and implementation experiments.

impact.zh: 把技术实验变成一个可以反复回到其中检验交互与架构想法的空间。
impact.en: Created a reusable place for testing interaction and architecture ideas before product adoption.

role.zh: 独立完成实验工程与界面原型。
role.en: Solo experimental engineering and UI prototyping.

challenge.zh: 需要一个不受产品约束的空间，用来验证更锋利的技术与体验想法。
challenge.en: Needed a safe space for technically sharp experiments without product constraints.

outcome.zh: 把松散的探索转化为可反哺正式产品的直觉与方法。
outcome.en: Turned loose technical exploration into reusable product intuition.

zh: 尝试了不同的动画节奏、着色器式氛围与界面深度。
用原型去压力测试设计与技术判断。
把实验归档成未来可以回看的参考，而不是一次性 demo。
en: Explored animation timing, shader-like atmospheres, and interface depth.
Used prototypes to pressure-test design and technical ideas.
Kept experiments archived as future references instead of one-off demos.

description.zh: 我更偏爱那些表层像被认真设计过、底层又能被继续组合的产品。
description.en: I prefer products that feel authored on the surface and composable underneath.

description.zh: 动画应该服务于阅读顺序、空间连续性与触感清晰，而不是炫耀自己。
description.en: Animation should support reading order, continuity, and tactile clarity.

description.zh: 可以在界面评审、实现细节与产品逻辑之间自然切换。
description.en: Comfortable moving between interface review, implementation detail, and product logic.

title.zh: 高级前端 / 产品工程师

company.zh: 独立合作 + 产品团队

summary.zh: 为有野心的软件产品交付高质量界面与前端系统。
summary.en: Shipping high-quality interfaces and frontend systems for ambitious software products.

zh: 主导多页 Web 体验从方向到上线的全过程。
构建可扩展代码库的共享 UI 原语与路由架构。
在视觉方向与实现细节之间承担桥梁角色。
en: Led multi-page web experiences from direction to production readiness.
Built shared UI primitives and route architecture for scaling codebases.
Acted as the bridge between visual direction and implementation detail.

summary.zh: 参与数据密集型应用，重点关注可靠性、响应性与可维护性。
summary.en: Worked on data-rich applications with a focus on reliability, responsiveness, and maintainability.

zh: 通过更好的层级与状态处理提升 dashboard 可用性。
推进内部设计系统与组件一致性的落地。
在提升性能的同时减少回归风险。
en: Improved dashboard usability through better hierarchy and state handling.
Contributed to internal design-system adoption and component consistency.
Reduced regressions while improving page performance.

summary.zh: 在全栈特性交付中逐步形成对前端手艺的强烈偏好。
summary.en: Built features across the stack while developing a strong bias for frontend craft.

zh: 从 API 集成到客户端行为打磨，完整负责功能交付。
学会在不提前过度设计的情况下保持架构弹性。
把模糊的产品需求转译成清楚的界面结构。
en: Owned full feature delivery from API integration to polished client behavior.
Learned to keep architecture flexible without over-engineering it.
Built the habit of turning ambiguous product asks into clear interfaces.

excerpt.zh: 很多最好的布局决定，往往不是坐在屏幕前得出来的。
excerpt.en: Some of the best layout decisions arrive away from the screen.

body.zh: 再次提醒自己：当我暂时离开实现细节，去想一页内容应该怎样呼吸时，节奏与层级往往会突然变得清楚。
body.en: A reminder that pacing and hierarchy often become obvious when I stop staring at the implementation and think about how the page should breathe.

zh: 设计
过程
笔记
en: design
process
notes

title.zh: 键盘、雨声、一个修好的 bug

excerpt.zh: 一个很小的技术修复，也足以重新校准整天的情绪温度。
excerpt.en: A tiny technical fix can reset the emotional temperature of a whole day.

body.zh: 追到了一个状态同步问题，它让某条流程一直比应该的样子更沉重。代码层面很小，体验层面却影响很大。
body.en: Tracked down a state sync issue that had been making a flow feel heavier than it should. It was minor in code and major in experience.

zh: 工程
调试
日常
en: engineering
debugging
daily

excerpt.zh: 实体空间仍然能教会数字界面很多关于克制的事。
excerpt.en: Physical spaces still teach digital interfaces a lot about restraint.

body.zh: 那天我花在作品之间留白上的时间，比看作品本身还多。好的策展会留出足够的空间，让观看者自己抵达。
body.en: Spent more time looking at spacing between works than the works themselves. Good curation leaves enough room for the viewer to arrive.

zh: 审美
空间
世界
en: aesthetics
space
world
